rule: A requirement contributes to completion ONLY when its validator has executed successfully against current evidence. There is no other way to be complete. Editing 'state' in this file does nothing — the engine ignores it and runs the validator.

requirements.statement: Exactly one authorization-eligible H1 candidate exists; test and superseded packages can never be authorized.
requirements.acceptance: registry status == RECONCILED and exactly one ACTIVE_CANDIDATE

requirements.statement: Founder authorization is fully bound (id, package, digests, providers, models, caps, expiry) and atomically consumed exactly once; replay is impossible.
requirements.acceptance: 24 enforcement proofs pass against production code
requirements.evidence_note: Commit-bound proof artifact written only by a passing run of scripts/goal/refresh_enforcement_proofs.py (2026-07-22 fix: evidence freshness = proofs re-demonstrated, not source mtime; production code remains scripts/council/h1_authorization.py)

requirements.statement: Mock or dry-run evidence can never produce frontier quorum, promotion, or safe-to-execute.
requirements.acceptance: aggregate() hard assertion holds; mock/dry-run yield only their bounded status
requirements.validator: python3 -m pytest tests/test_h1b_authorization_enforcement.py -q -k 'quorum or mock or dry_run or advisory or partial'
requirements.evidence_note: Commit-bound proof artifact written only by a passing run of scripts/goal/refresh_enforcement_proofs.py (2026-07-22 fix: evidence freshness = proofs re-demonstrated, not source mtime; production code remains scripts/council/aggregate.py)

requirements.statement: No external model call or spend can occur outside a gate that can refuse. Missing budget evidence fails closed.
requirements.acceptance: SubprocessSpendGate refuses on every violation; spend is hash-ledgered

requirements.statement: No fake green: no completion metric may be emitted from a fallback default, and a missing timestamp may not render as fresh.
requirements.acceptance: zero fallback completion percentages reachable; missing source -> null + UNKNOWN
requirements.known_state_at_ratification: FAIL — 94 fallback sites in backend/pert_server.py (audit F-02.1)

requirements.statement: Every test in the enforcement suites reads real files; no test may substitute a string literal for a file read.
requirements.acceptance: no tautological tests
requirements.note: Audit F-21.3: a tautological test was found injected into the anti-false-green suite and was passing.

requirements.statement: The council autonomously dispatches a task to >=2 real model adapters, captures, validates, revises, and updates PERT state with zero founder copy/paste.
requirements.acceptance: pert_node_state == COMPLETED via MULTI_ADAPTER_VALIDATED_EVIDENCE and manual_copy_paste_operations == 0

requirements.statement: The dispatch loop is the only spawn point for model CLIs.
requirements.acceptance: dispatch.py imports no subprocess; all spawns route through the spend gate
requirements.evidence_note: Commit-bound proof artifact written only by a passing run of scripts/goal/refresh_enforcement_proofs.py (2026-07-22 fix: evidence freshness = proofs re-demonstrated, not source mtime; production code remains scripts/council/dispatch.py)

requirements.statement: The direct-POST model adapter path (OpenAIAdapter.execute) is brought under the spend gate.
requirements.acceptance: no urllib POST to a provider endpoint outside the gate
requirements.note: Found by the council itself on its first live dispatch: scripts/prompt_brain/model_adapters.py:102-107.

requirements.statement: The command center serves runtime truth: the council state endpoint is registered and reachable.
requirements.acceptance: GET /api/v1/helm/council/state returns 200 with the eight separated gates
requirements.known_state_at_ratification: FAIL — 616 routes registered, zero containing 'council' (audit F-02.4). Endpoint and frontend tree were destroyed by a concurrent lane.

requirements.statement: A champion product is selected by the authoritative portfolio prioritization process.
requirements.acceptance: canonical_goal_contract.goal_hierarchy.3_current_champion_product.value is non-null and traceable to a prioritization run

requirements.statement: The champion product ships to production distribution.
requirements.acceptance: release + rollback packages exist, signed and submitted

requirements.statement: The full autonomous path from intake to DOORSTEP is proven end to end.
requirements.acceptance: one work item traverses intake -> plan -> execute -> validate -> evidence -> DOORSTEP with no founder step except a founder-only gate

requirements.statement: Founder is not the routine transport layer between agents, models, IDEs, or execution systems.
requirements.acceptance: founder_intervention_rate for routine council tasks == 0

requirements.statement: verified_founder_minutes_per_shipped_dollar is measured, not estimated.
requirements.acceptance: the metric is computed from a real founder-minutes ledger and real revenue; UNKNOWN until both exist
requirements.known_state_at_ratification: UNKNOWN — no founder-minutes ledger exists and no revenue has been shipped. Honest zero.

requirements.acceptance: champion_gates.json gate BUILD == PASS against fresh evidence
